{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/176621958?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/celinke97/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/celinke97/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/celinke97/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/celinke97/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/celinke97", "id": 176621958, "login": "celinke97", "node_id": "U_kgDOCocJhg", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/celinke97/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/celinke97/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/celinke97/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/celinke97/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/celinke97/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/celinke97", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-49244", "cvss": {"score": 5.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}], "description": "## Summary

The public web-client endpoint for partial ZIP downloads of a browsable share did not correctly confine the client-supplied files entries to the shared directory. A requester able to reach a public share could read files located outside the shared directory, as long as the target's canonical path begins with the shared directory's name.

## Patches

Fixed in v2.7.3. The fix replaces the raw prefix check with a directory-boundary–aware check.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00057, "percentile": 0.1829}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-h64p-8h4r-6gfh", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-02T19:09:13Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-h64p-8h4r-6gfh", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-h64p-8h4r-6gfh"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-49244"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-02T19:09:13Z", "references": ["https://github.com/drakkan/sftpgo/security/advisories/GHSA-h64p-8h4r-6gfh", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-h64p-8h4r-6gfh"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/drakkan/sftpgo/security-advisories/GHSA-h64p-8h4r-6gfh", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/drakkan/sftpgo", "summary": "SFTPGo has path confinement bypass in public browsable share partial ZIP download", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-02T19:10:30Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-h64p-8h4r-6gfh", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.7.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/drakkan/sftpgo/v2"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.2.0, <= 2.7.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: SFTPGo has path confinement bypass in public browsable share partial ZIP download
